prompt: Order these meteorological events from earliest to latest

events.title: Galileo water thermoscope
events.fact: 1593 — first device to measure temperature variations

events.title: Torricelli invents barometer
events.fact: 1643 — invents first mercury barometer to measure pressure

events.title: Cloud classification proposed
events.fact: 1802 — Luke Howard defines cumulus, stratus, cirrus

events.title: Beaufort wind scale designed
events.fact: 1805 — Francis Beaufort designs empirical wind force scale

events.title: First weather satellite
events.fact: 1960 — TIROS-1 launched, transmits first cloud images

events.title: Chaos theory published
events.fact: 1963 — Edward Lorenz details limits of weather forecasting
